// Sanitized sample of Asus/Tomato router /status-devices.asp response // Used for unit testing router adapter parsing logic var dhcpLeaseMacList = [['swarm0','192.168.1.50','B8:27:EB:80:09:E3'],['laptop','192.168.1.100','AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:01'],['phone','192.168.1.101','AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:02']]; var staticList = ['B8:27:EB:80:09:E3<192.168.1.50
